name: docx_render_preview
description: Render pages of the document to images and return resource links so you can check your own work: render, look, fix. Use at verification checkpoints after a batch of layout-affecting edits, not after every edit — renders cost seconds. The response names the renderer and any font substitutions so you can calibrate trust.

pages.description: 1-based page numbers to render. Omit to render every page.
Renderer path only: one entry per rendered page with its image resource link. Omitted in the structural fallback (use page_count there).

image.description: Resource link like 'docx://d1/preview/page-1.png'. Present only when a renderer (LibreOffice) produced an image.

page_count.description: Structural fallback only (renderer 'structural'): the estimated page count (ceil(total_chars / 1800)). Replaces the per-page array when no renderer ran.

structural.description: Structural fallback only (renderer 'structural'): the §2 projection of the resolved document. Present when no render adapter is available (auto-fetch off, unsupported, or failed).
